creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Thomas,

your PR for updating the port graphics/gmt to 4.2.1 ([1]) is lacking a
patch that can be tested/committed. Can you provide one? I'm also cc'ing
the maintainer of graphics/gmt, whose approval is needed and who might be
able to help with creating the patch if necessary.

Best regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/121405
